| - update to 1.4.0
| - replace files/patch-Makefile.in with MAKE_ARGS
| - remove extraneous SUB_FILES; unnecessary when USE_RC_SUBR set
| - MANCOMPRESSED defaults to 'no'; no need to set it explicitly
